key.name: pass-command
key.description: Command used to invoke pass. Can be "pass" or a full wrapper like a podman command.

key.name: backend
key.description: Backend used to access the password store. Valid values are "ripasso" and "pass".

key.name: new-pass-file-template
key.description: Lines added after the password line when creating a new password entry.

key.name: ripasso-own-fingerprint
key.description: Fingerprint of the private key that ripasso should use for password store operations.
